case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. SANDRA LORENA CARDOZA-JARQUIN

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.54 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CARDOZA-JARQUIN, SANDRA LORENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT SANDRA CARDOZA-JARQUIN DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
